title: eremopyrum cretense
intro: Eremopyrum cretense, also known as Cretan wheat grass, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eremopyrum cretense include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used in tea or infusion form, and it can also be dried and used as a supplement.
